title: How to Install Approved Software from the Software Catalog
text:
Q: How can I install approved software from the software catalog on my computer?
A: Windows: Step 1: Click on the Start menu and open the 'Software Center' application. Step 2: In the Software Center, navigate to the 'Applications' tab to view the available software. Step 3: Browse or search for the approved software you wish to install. Step 4: Click on the software name to see more details, then click the 'Install' button. Step 5: Follow any prompts to complete the installation. macOS: Step 1: Open the 'Self Service' application from your Applications folder. Step 2: In Self Service, you will see a list of available software. Step 3: Use the search bar or scroll through the list to find the approved software you want to install. Step 4: Click on the software icon to view details, then click the 'Install' button. Step 5: Wait for the installation to complete, and you may need to enter your administrator password to authorize the installation. Step 6: Once installed, you can find the software in your Applications folder or Launchpad. If you encounter any issues, please contact the IT helpdesk for assistance.
